zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur於1273年出生在英國維爾爾時，他的父親Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle29歲，母親Emma de Bassingbourne26歲。他於大約1303年與Eve Meysey結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1316年11月8日之前在英國哈普爾維古姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur于1273年出生在英国維爾爾时，他的父亲Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle29岁，母亲Emma de Bassingbourne26岁。他于大约1303年与Eve Meysey结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1316年11月8日之前在英国哈普爾維古姆。

nameMeanings.name: St
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Southern French: variant of   St  .   Romain  .

variants.name: Romain
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Alain, Altagrace, Aurore, Camille, Dominique, Edele, Georges, Henri, Jacques, Jean-Marie, Jean-Michel, Jeanmarie.
French, West Indian (mainly Haiti), and English: variant of   Roman  .

nameMeanings.name: Maur
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: nickname for someone supposedly resembling a mouse, in appearance or timidity, from Middle High German mūs ‘mouse’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from German Maus ‘mouse’, one of the most common of the unflattering surnames imposed on Jews by non-Jewish government officials in 18th- and 19th-century central Europe.

variants.name: Muus
meanings: German (Hamburg): nickname for someone supposedly resembling a mouse, in appearance or timidity, from Middle High German mūs ‘mouse’. Compare Maus and Muhs .

variants.name: Muske
meanings: North German (also Müske): nickname from a diminutive of Middle Low German mūs ‘mouse’ (see Maus 1).

variants.name: Meisel
meanings: German: nickname for someone supposedly resembling a mouse, in appearance or timidity, from Middle High German mūs ‘mouse’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from German Maus ‘mouse’, one of the most common of the unflattering surnames imposed on Jews by non-Jewish government officials in 18th- and 19th-century central Europe.

variants.name: Mousel
meanings: Americanized form of German Mäusl, from a diminutive of Maus .

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur was born in 1273, in Wiltshire, England, his father, Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle, was 29 and his mother, Emma de Bassingbourne, was 26. He married Eve Meysey about 1303. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died before 8 November 1316, in Winchester, Hampshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur est né en 1273, à Wiltshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Emma de Bassingbourne, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Eve Meysey environ 1303. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé avant 8 novembre 1316, à Winchester, Hampshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur 1273 in Wiltshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle 29 und seine Mutter Emma de Bassingbourne 26. Er hat um 1303 Eve Meysey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb vor 8. November 1316 in Winchester, Hampshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur è nato il nel 1273 nel Wiltshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Emma de Bassingbourne, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Eve Meysey circa 1303. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì prima del 8 novembre 1316, nel Winchester, Hampshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maurが1273年にイギリスウィルトシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castleは29歳，母Emma de Bassingbourneは26歳であった。約1303年にEve Meyseyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1316年11月8日以前にイギリスハンプシュアイアウィンチェスターで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur(이)가 1273년 영국 윌츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Emma de Bassingbourne(은)는 26세였다. 그는 대략 1303년 Eve Meysey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1316년 11월 8일 이전 영국 함프실르 윈체스터에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur nasceu em 1273, em Wiltshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Emma de Bassingbourne, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Eve Meysey aproximadamente 1303. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu antes 8 de novembro de 1316, em Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur родился в 1273 г. в местности уилцхир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Emma de Bassingbourne, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Eve Meysey около 1303 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер перед 8 ноябрь 1316 г. в местности винчестир, хампшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Nicholas St Maur 1st Baron Saint-Maur nació en 1273, en Wiltshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Laurence de St. Maur of Road, Keeper of Jedburgh Castle, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Emma de Bassingbourne, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Eve Meysey aproximadamente 1303. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió antes de 8 de noviembre de 1316, en Winchester, Hampshire, Inglaterra.
